\section*{NAME}
codata\_constant\_type - data type defining a constant

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
Fortran: type(codata\_constant\_type) :: c

C: struct codata\_constant\_type c

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Defines a constant with the name, the value, the uncertainty and the unit.

\section*{EXAMPLE}
Fortran:

\begin{verbatim}
      use codata
      type(codata_constant_type), pointer :: c
      c = SPEED_OF_LIGHT_IN_VACUUM

\end{verbatim}
C:

\begin{verbatim}
      struct codata_constant_type c;
      c = SPEED_OF_LIGHT_IN_VACUUM;

\end{verbatim}
\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata(3)
